LOTRO Character Bridge

Seamlessly import character data from LOTRO

LOTRO Game Checking...
Bridge Plugin Checking...

🚀 Plugin Installation

The bridge plugin needs to be installed to your LOTRO account directory.

Your LOTRO Structure:
📁 Documents\The Lord of the Rings Online\PluginData\
   📂 [YourAccount] (e.g., "aaxxis")
     📂 AllServers ← Install here!
  1. Click "Install Bridge Plugin" below
  2. Save the downloaded .lua file
  3. Navigate to your PluginData\[Account]\AllServers folder
  4. Copy the .lua file there
  5. Restart LOTRO to load the plugin
Expected location: C:\Users\[YOU]\OneDrive\Documents\The Lord of the Rings Online\PluginData\[ACCOUNT]\AllServers\

📁 Installation Steps

Copy the downloaded plugin to your LOTRO account folder:

  1. Open File Explorer and navigate to your Documents
  2. Go to: The Lord of the Rings Online\PluginData
  3. Find your account folder (e.g., "aaxxis")
  4. Open the AllServers subfolder
  5. Copy LOTROGuidesExporter.lua into AllServers
  6. Restart LOTRO if it's running
Example:
C:\Users\me\OneDrive\Documents\The Lord of the Rings Online\PluginData\aaxxis\AllServers\LOTROGuidesExporter.lua

📦 Installation Progress
